utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all 6 corresponding sections. Now check each for full specification per the format's expectations: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (name, address, bedrooms, price) — fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (type, mortgage amount, down payment, arrangement fee). While not exhaustive terms (rate/term length), it does present a solution and basic terms — acceptable for this format.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (description and cost) — present.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (description and cost) — present.
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (description and cost) — present.
- total_budget: includes a complete cost breakdown (lists property price, down payment, fees, survey cost, moving, utilities, and estimated initial out-of-pocket). Although the user also asked to share with spouse and to find 2-3 properties, those are outside the strict format check. All 6 items are present and reasonably detailed per the required format.
